spots.title: Wire the deployment manifest to the DeepBook SDK client
spots.prompt:
The deployment manifest has been fetched. Now you need to wire it into the DeepBook SDK client.

Your task: implement the three helper functions (`packageIds`, `coinMap`, `poolMap`) that extract the SDK configuration from the manifest, then build the `SuiGrpcClient` and attach the `deepbook` extension.

You are configuring for pool: {{ pool_subset }}.

Lines 39–58 of `src/App.tsx` are the target. Use `packageIds(manifest)`, `coinMap(manifest)`, and `poolMap(manifest)` as arguments to the `deepbook(...)` call.

spots.title: Implement withRetry around simulateTransaction-backed SDK calls
spots.prompt:
Implement withRetry around simulateTransaction-backed SDK calls. Your withRetry helper should accept a generic async function, a retry count (default 3), and a base delay in milliseconds (default 200). On failure it should wait baseDelayMs * 2^attempt before retrying, and re-throw after all retries are exhausted.

Lines 103–114 of `src/App.tsx` are the target.

spots.title: Implement the polling tick with failure tolerance
spots.prompt:
Poll the order book every {{ poll_interval_ms }} ms; on failure, retry with exponential backoff. Implement the polling tick: midPrice + getLevel2TicksFromMid every {{ poll_interval_ms }} ms; surface error only after 3 consecutive failures.

Lines 116–145 of `src/App.tsx` are the target. Use setInterval for the polling loop and clean up with clearInterval on unmount.
